Combat sport events in 2022
ONE: Heavy Hitters
The poster for ONE: Heavy Hitters
PromotionONE Championship
DateJanuary 14, 2022 (2022-01-14)
VenueSingapore Indoor Stadium
CityKallang, Singapore
Event chronology
ONE: Winter Warriors 2 ONE: Heavy Hitters ONE: Only the Brave

ONE: Heavy Hitters (also known as ONE 150: Xiong vs. Miura) was a Combat sport event produced by ONE Championship that took place on January 14, 2022, at the Singapore Indoor Stadium in Kallang, Singapore.[1][2]

Background

[edit]

The event was headlined by a ONE Women's Strawweight World Championship bout between current Champion Xiong Jingnan and Ayaka Miura.[3]

A ONE Light Heavyweight Kickboxing World Championship bout between current champion Roman Kryklia and Murat Aygün was expected to take place at the event.[4] The two were originally scheduled to fight at ONE Championship: Big Bang last year.[5] However, in turn, Aygün has to withdraw on January 12 due to COVID-19, the bout was cancelled for the second time.[6]

Filipino fighter Jeremy Miado and Robin Catalan will not be taking part in the upcoming event due to COVID-19. The pinoys opponents will thus face each other instead. Catalan, will return to action after a year against Elipitua Siregar on the card.[7]

Results

[edit]
Main card (YouTube / ONE Super App)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Women's Strawweight Xiong Jing Nan (c) def. Ayaka Miura Decision (unanimous) 5 5:00 [a]
Catchweight (146.4 lbs) Muay Thai Tawanchai P.K.Saenchai def. Saemapetch Fairtex KO (punches) 1 2:55 [b]
Lightweight Saygid Izagakhmaev def. James Nakashima Submission (D'Arce choke) 2 2:17
Women's Strawweight Muay Thai Supergirl Jarronsak def. Ekaterina Vandaryeva Decision (split) 3 3:00
Strawweight Senzo Ikeda def. Elipitua Siregar KO (punch to the body) 3 2:00
Light Heavyweight Kickboxing Giannis Stoforidis def. Beybulat Isaev KO (punch) 1 0:31
Lead card (YouTube / Facebook / ONE Super App)
Women's Strawweight Tiffany Teo def. Meng Bo Submission (rear-naked choke) 2 3:45
Bantamweight Shuya Kamikubo def. Troy Worthen Submission (rear-naked choke) 3 4:36
  1. ^ For the ONE Women's Strawweight World Championship.
  2. ^ Tawanchai missed weight (146.4 lb).

[8]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.[9]

  • Performance of the Night: Senzo Ikeda, Ekaterina Vandaryeva and Saygid Izagakhmaev
